utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. Therefore, all 5 required items are present and fully detailed.

The health coverage combines LifeFirst Standard Plan for both physical and mental health (since the policy numbers LF-HEALTH-001 and LF-MENTAL-001 correspond to LifeFirst). The additional services include 'Adventure sports coverage' (matching 'Adventure Travel Coverage' in travel_enhancement_services, rated 10) and 'Wellness programs' (matching 'Wellness Programs' in health_enhancement_services, rated 3). Therefore, the relevant items and their ratings are: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health: 9), LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health: 4), InsurePlus Standard Coverage (property: 10), LifeFirst Standard Plan (travel: 9), Adventure Travel Coverage (10), and Wellness Programs (3).
